HPCell 0.5.0
  • Reference

    Create pseudobulk

    create_pseudobulk.Rd

    Aggregates cells based on sample and cell type annotations, creating pseudobulk samples for each combination. Handles RNA and ADT assays

    create_pseudobulk(
  input_read_RNA_assay,
  sample_names_vec,
  empty_droplets_tbl = NULL,
  alive_identification_tbl = NULL,
  cell_cycle_score_tbl = NULL,
  annotation_label_transfer_tbl = NULL,
  cell_type_ensembl_harmonised_tbl = NULL,
  doublet_identification_tbl = NULL,
  x = c(),
  external_path,
  assays = NULL,
  container_type
)

    Arguments

    input_read_RNA_assay

    A SingleCellExperiment or Seurat object containing RNA assay data.

    sample_names_vec

    Character vector of sample names (one element per sample mapping to the input object).

    empty_droplets_tbl

    A tibble identifying empty droplets. NULL skips.

    alive_identification_tbl

    A tibble from alive_identification(). NULL skips.

    cell_cycle_score_tbl

    A tibble from cell_cycle_scoring(). NULL skips.

    annotation_label_transfer_tbl

    A tibble from annotation_label_transfer(). NULL skips.

    cell_type_ensembl_harmonised_tbl

    A tibble with harmonised cell-type annotations. NULL skips.

    doublet_identification_tbl

    A tibble from doublet identification. NULL skips.

    x

    Optional grouping variable (column name) used to further stratify pseudobulk aggregation beyond sample.

    external_path

    Character path to the directory where pseudobulk HDF5 files are stored.

    assays

    Character vector of assay names to include (e.g. c("RNA", "ADT")). NULL uses all assays.

    container_type

    Character scalar specifying the output file format.

    Value

    A list containing pseudobulk SummarizedExperiment objects aggregated by sample and (optionally) by sample × cell type.

    Contents

    Developed by Stefano Mangiola, Jiayi Si.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
